title: Missed Passenger Assist
header: I am writing to complain about a failure to provide Passenger Assist on a journey with {{operator}} on {{date}} at {{location}}.
legalParagraph: Operators are required under the Accessible Travel Policy framework (overseen by the ORR) and the Equality Act 2010 to provide reliable, pre-booked assistance and to make reasonable adjustments. A failure to provide booked assistance is a service failure under your ATP and may constitute a breach of duty under the Equality Act 2010.
ask: I would like a full investigation, a written explanation within 20 working days, the appropriate compensation under your Passenger Assist policy, and confirmation of the corrective action taken to prevent this from happening again.
